creator: g71@laposte.net
text:
when i do "pkg_add -r openoffice.org", i get:
Error: FTP Unable to get ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-7.1-release/Latest/openoffice.org.tbz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)

yes, there is no openoffice in this folder. but it exists in the editors folder.

Fix: 

put the openoffice link in the Latest folder.

bye!
How-To-Repeat: see above.
